phase_history.notes: M1 Temporal Warp: circular buffer, envelope/Pitch/ZCR detection, state machine (NORMAL→JUMPING→LOOPING→RELEASING), micro-looping with feedback, crossfade release

M5 Digital Debris: White/Burst/Crackle noise with Sync/Free trigger and exponential decay envelope. M6 Bit Flipping: IEEE 754 float bit manipulation with Invert/Random/Multiply modes, probability gate, NaN/Inf safety, post-injection hard clipper

implementation_progress.notes: ALL 6 MODULES IMPLEMENTED: M1 Temporal Warp (circular buffer, transient/pitch/free detection, state machine, micro-looping, feedback), M2 Bit Crusher (1-32 bit quantization), M3 Sample Rate Decimator (ZOH/Linear, 1-256x), M4 Clipper (Hard/Soft/Fold + Drive), M5 Digital Debris (White/Burst/Crackle, Sync/Free trigger, decay envelope), M6 Bit Flipping (IEEE 754 Invert/Random/Multiply, probability gate, NaN-safe). Full signal chain, parameter smoothing, VST3/AU/Standalone targets building.
